mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_operation_log (operator_id, operator_name, operated_at, operation_type, module, target_type, target_id, target_label, change_summary, change_detail, ip, user_agent) VALUES (#{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operatedAt}, #{operationType}, #{module}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetLabel}, #{changeSummary}, #{changeDetail}, #{ip}, #{userAgent})
